elements.name: Description
texts:
Crocknacunny is in the Electoral Division of Pettigoe, in Civil Parish of Templecarn, in the Barony of Tirhugh, in the County of Donegal

The Irish name for Crocknacunny is Cnoc na Coinne

Crocknacunny is on Logainm.ie: Crocknacunny.

Crocknacunny has an area of:

    -6,915,360 m² / 691.54 hectares / 6.9154 km²
    -2.67 square miles
    -1708.82 acres / 1708 acres, 3 roods, 11 perches

Nationwide, it is the 629th largest townland that we know about

Within Co. Donegal, it is the 84th largest townland
